subcodes.first_line: O nightingale of the rose-garden of God! Singing melodies will bring animation and happiness to the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بلبل باغ الهی نغمه سراای سبب سرور و شادمانی عالم انسانی است
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
